title: 25 PCS Glitter Gold Poinsettia Christmas Decorations with Stems, Christmas Tree Decorations Artificial Flowers for Xmas Tree Wedding Xmas Wreath Home Party Decor
features: 【Package Contents】This set contains 25 poinsettia christmas decorations flowers (25 gold poinsettia flowers + 25 pieces of wire). The christmas flowers artificial measures approximately 5.51 x 5.51 in (14 x 14 cm), a quantity sufficient for most decoration needs.

【Easy to Decorate】The christmas tree flowers comes with a stem that can be easily pushed into the stem hole and attached to your Christmas tree, wreath, or tree branches, adding a festive touch to your Christmas tree. The gold poinsettia will brighten up your holiday season.

【Durable Material】 Made of high-quality fabric and plastic, this gold poinsettia christmas decorations is durable, flexible, and retains its shape. Christmas flower decorations is embellished with glitter for a striking and beautiful look. Note: The glitter may flake off slightly during use.

【Elegant Design】The poinsettia christmas tree decorations consists of a round anther and filaments extending from the stamen. The petals are spiky and intertwined, creating an elegant and shimmering appearance. The christmas tree flower decorations design is sophisticated and eye-catching.

【Versatile Uses】The gold flowers for christmas tree is suitable for Christmas trees, wreaths, fireplace decorations, and more. It can also be used for holiday parties, weddings, birthdays, New Year's parties, or other festive occasions, creating a joyful and warm atmosphere.
description: Product details Material: Plastic, cloth Color: Gold Dimensions: 5.51*5.51in (14*14cm) Package contents: 25 gold flower christmas tree decorations Features: 🧑‍🎄This package contains 25 gold poinsettia christmas tree decoration, sufficient for most of your decorative needs. 🧑‍🎄The christmas tree poinsettia are made of high-quality cloth and plastic, and glitter is added for added appeal. 🧑‍🎄The gold christmas flowers are suitable for christmas tree decorations, mantelpiece decorations, christmas wreaths, and other room decor. 🧑‍🎄Simply insert the stem into the flower christmas decorations base and attach it anywhere you like. Note: The glitter on the poinsettia christmas decorations May flake off; simply shake it off; it will not affect the appearance.
